comp.description: PTSA 1,5/ 2-3,5-Z - Printed circuit board terminal, nominal current: 8 A, rated voltage (III/2): 400 V, nominal cross section: 1.5 mm<sup>2</sup>, number of potentials: 2, number of rows: 1, number of positions per row: 2, product range: PTSA 1,5, pitch: 3.5 mm, connection method: Push-in spring connection, mounting: Wave soldering, conductor/PCB connection direction: 45 , color: green, Pin layout: Zigzag pinning W, Solder pin [P]: 3.5 mm, number of solder pins per potential: 1, type of packaging: packed i
